Potato___Early_blight.name: Potato Early Blight
Potato___Early_blight.simple_en: Your potato leaf has early blight spots. Don't worry, it can be treated.
Potato___Early_blight.simple_hi: आपके आलू के पत्ते पर शुरुआती झुलसा रोग है। चिंता न करें, इसका इलाज हो सकता है।
Potato___Early_blight.symptoms: Dark brown to black circular spots with concentric rings on older leaves.
Potato___Early_blight.prevention: Crop rotation, avoid overhead irrigation, use certified disease-free seeds.
Potato___Early_blight.treatment: Apply fungicides containing chlorothalonil or mancozeb at the first sign of disease.

Potato___Late_blight.name: Potato Late Blight
Potato___Late_blight.simple_en: Warning: Potato late blight detected. This can spread fast. Act now.
Potato___Late_blight.simple_hi: चेतावनी: आलू का पिछेती झुलसा रोग पाया गया है। यह तेजी से फैल सकता है। अभी कदम उठाएं।
Potato___Late_blight.symptoms: Dark, water-soaked patches on leaves that grow rapidly. White mold may appear on the underside.
Potato___Late_blight.prevention: Plant resistant varieties, ensure good soil drainage, remove infected debris.
Potato___Late_blight.treatment: Use fungicides such as copper-based sprays or specialized systemic fungicides.

Potato___healthy.name: Healthy Potato
Potato___healthy.simple_en: Great news! Your potato plant is perfectly healthy.
Potato___healthy.simple_hi: बहुत अच्छी खबर! आपका आलू का पौधा पूरी तरह स्वस्थ है।
Potato___healthy.symptoms: Leaves are green and free from spots or patches.
Potato___healthy.prevention: Maintain regular watering and fertilization; monitor for early signs of pests.

Tomato___Bacterial_spot.name: Tomato Bacterial Spot
Tomato___Bacterial_spot.simple_en: Your tomato plant has bacterial spots. Keep leaves dry.
Tomato___Bacterial_spot.simple_hi: आपके टमाटर के पौधे पर बैक्टीरियल धब्बे हैं। पत्तों को सूखा रखें।
Tomato___Bacterial_spot.symptoms: Small, dark, water-soaked spots on leaves which later turn brown and papery.
Tomato___Bacterial_spot.prevention: Use pathogen-free seeds, avoid working with plants when they are wet.
Tomato___Bacterial_spot.treatment: Copper-based sprays can help reduce the spread of bacteria.

Tomato___Leaf_Mold.name: Tomato Leaf Mold
Tomato___Leaf_Mold.simple_en: Tomato leaf mold detected. Needs better air circulation.
Tomato___Leaf_Mold.simple_hi: टमाटर के पत्तों पर फफूंद (लीफ मोल्ड) पाई गई है। बेहतर हवा की जरूरत है।
Tomato___Leaf_Mold.symptoms: Pale greenish-yellow spots on the upper leaf surface; olive-green fuzzy growth on the underside.
Tomato___Leaf_Mold.prevention: Improve air circulation, reduce humidity in greenhouses, use resistant varieties.
Tomato___Leaf_Mold.treatment: Apply fungicides containing calcium polysulfide or other approved products.

Tomato___healthy.name: Healthy Tomato
Tomato___healthy.simple_en: Your tomato plant looks very healthy and strong.
Tomato___healthy.simple_hi: आपका टमाटर का पौधा बहुत स्वस्थ और मजबूत दिख रहा है।
Tomato___healthy.symptoms: Lush green foliage with no signs of discoloration or mold.
Tomato___healthy.prevention: Ensure adequate spacing and consistent watering.
